data.title: Create representative eval for oscillation-check skill and eval convention guide
data.description:
Create the representative skill eval and document the eval convention for skill authors.

## Part 1: Representative Eval Config
Create plugins/dso/skills/oscillation-check/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml

### Provider Configuration
Use anthropic:claude-agent-sdk provider — this is a promptfoo built-in provider that invokes Claude Code via the Anthropic SDK. Configuration:
- provider: anthropic:messages:claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 (for the skill execution)
- defaultTest.options.provider: anthropic:messages:claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 (for the grader — Haiku default per epic requirement)

### Test Cases
At least 2 test cases:
1. OSCILLATION scenario — provide file diffs showing same files being modified back and forth, assert grader evaluates output contains OSCILLATION verdict
2. CLEAR scenario — provide file diffs with no repetition pattern, assert grader evaluates output contains CLEAR verdict

### Assertion Types
Use llm-rubric assertion: grade the skill output quality (does it correctly identify oscillation patterns and provide actionable analysis?)

## Part 2: Eval Convention Guide
Create plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md documenting:
- Directory layout convention (skills/<name>/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml)
- Required promptfooconfig.yaml fields (provider, tests, defaultTest.options.provider)
- Grader model configuration (Haiku default, Sonnet override via provider field)
- How to run evals: run-skill-evals.sh usage, Tier 1 vs Tier 2 modes
- How to interpret results: exit codes, JSON output format
- Example: reference the oscillation-check eval as a template

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Eval config exists at correct path
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/oscillation-check/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Config contains required fields (provider, tests)
  Verify: grep -q 'provider:' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/oscillation-check/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml && grep -q 'tests:' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/oscillation-check/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Config sets Haiku as default grader
  Verify: grep -q 'haiku' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/oscillation-check/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Config contains at least 2 test cases
  Verify: grep -c 'assert:' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/oscillation-check/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] Convention guide exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md
- [ ] Guide references run-skill-evals.sh usage
  Verify: grep -q 'run-skill-evals' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md
- [ ] Eval config validates with promptfoo (dry-run or parse check)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && npx promptfoo eval --config plugins/dso/skills/oscillation-check/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml --dry-run 2>&1 || echo "dry-run not supported — YAML parse check passed"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/oscillation-check/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml (create)
- plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md (create)
